mapper.insert: insert into fp_metric_collect_record (id, tenant_id, config_id, metric_definition_id, metric_code, implementation_id, implementation_code, object_type, object_id, object_code, execution_mode, executor_node_id, status, metric_value, message, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, created_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{configId}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{metricCode}, #{implementationId}, #{implementationCode}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{objectCode}, #{executionMode}, #{executorNodeId}, #{status}, #{value}, #{message}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{createdAt})
